children.name: 9. Set Local Storage to bypass UI
Authentication Management > Tests that require login
2. Verify secure area without logging in again
should log in successfully with valid credentials
should handle CapsLock state while entering the username
should show an error message with incorrect login credentials
should have empty fields by default on the login page
